items.title: AI agents are becoming workflow operators, not just chat tools
items.summary: Enterprise AI is moving toward agents that connect to context, systems, and governance.
items.business_takeaway: Pick one painful workflow and define the proof that counts as done.

items.title: The agent leap is really a workflow design problem
items.summary: AI value rises when agents orchestrate repeatable processes instead of answering isolated prompts.
items.business_takeaway: Assign one owner, one cadence, and one measurable outcome before adding more tools.

items.title: Code intelligence is becoming an operations discipline
items.summary: Agentic development is pushing teams toward context, specs, tests, and review loops.
items.business_takeaway: Even non-software companies need proof-aware agents when business logic lives inside tools and websites.

items.title: Enterprise AI resource

items.title: New enterprise installation API now in public preview
items.summary: Treat AI-assisted code changes as production work: inspect dependencies, secrets, tests, and rollback paths before shipping.
